gameDetails.name: The Werewolves bEat Robbers' Horror
gameDetails.description:
In a remote village plagued by theft and bloodshed, a silent war brews between treasure-hungry robbers and the lurking werewolves that feed on them. Every hand of cards becomes a new round of hidden alliances, shifting suspicions, and sudden reveals as players bluff and deduce their way through a battle of instincts and desires. Will you hunt... or be hunted?

The Werewolves bEat Robbers' Horror is a trick-taking and hidden-role team game where roles are secretly assigned at the start of each round and revealed mid-play through card actions. Each round, players aim to collect scoring cards that match their hidden roles (robbers want treasure, werewolves want thieves) while deducing allies through play patterns. A reversal of trick strength depending on the lead card’s type adds a twist to traditional trick-taking.
